en: Definitely Is it difficult to say this word Here's a pronunciation hack for you You can
ko: Definitely. 이 단어 말하기 어려워? 발음 꿀팁이 있어. 이 소리를

en: drop the ɪ sound and say definitely instead Definitely
Definitely If I had a million pounds I'd definitely buy a house What other words are difficult
ko: Definitely. 백만 파운드가 있으면 definitely 집을 살 거야. 발음하기 어려운 다른 단어는?
